headline: Ross Stores (ROST) Declines More Than Market: Some Information for Investors
summary: Ross Stores (ROST) reached $221.16 at the closing of the latest trading day, reflecting a -1.67% change compared to its last close.

headline: BURL's Strong Comps Reflect Value-Driven Merchandising Strength
summary: Burlington's 4% Q4 comps beat guidance, underscoring strong demand fueled by value-driven merchandising, better brands and disciplined inventory management.
